S.FORM: Byron Beck sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1945, ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 1, Byron Beck, squliq na p'unro. 1967-1976 kawas Byron Beck sangka' qeru pspung maki Amelika hlahuy. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ő≤jron ő≤e ¶~ ®k s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, ő≤jron ő≤e ¶~ ®k, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. ****-**** kawas~…ē ő≤jron ő≤e ¶~ ®k s~…ēaŇčka Ē qeru ps~…ēpuŇč maki amelika ńßlańßuj. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: Byron Beck sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1945, ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 1, Byron Beck, squliq na p'unro. 1967-1976 kawas Byron Beck sangka' qeru pspung maki Amelika hlahuy. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
